caption: A person's hands hold and manipulate sports trading cards encased in plastic protectors over a red and black surface. In the initial frames, the person holds two cards: one featuring a basketball player and another with a jersey swatch for "STEVEN ADAMS." A second person, wearing a black shirt, is visible in a small inset window in the background, sitting in front of a computer setup. On-screen text includes the logo "JASPYS" and the website "CASEBREAKS.COM" appearing in the center of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the person moves the cards, shifting their position in the frame and eventually moving one card out of view. The background features various card packs and a black box with green accents. The setting is a professional card-breaking station with consistent branding throughout the sequence.
